Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC000 "SPYDERS-3000-C000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $3000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Spyders (Mr. NOP - 2017).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $3000 which sets the pointer to beginning of the BASIC variable area ($2D/$2E) to allow the game to run correctly.
Also changed the CMP $D015 instruction at $9537 to be RTS instead to remove a checksum protection.
The following changes were made to allow for the fire button in port 2 to simulate the space bar being pressed to allow for skipping of the intro docs and game over screen:
1. Changed the JSR $FFE4 instructions at $92A6 and $C0A4 to be JSR $3100 instead. 2. Added a small routine at $3100 to check the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then it sets the accumulator to $20 and returns, which causes the game to behave as if the space bar was pressed. If not pressed, the routine then JSRs to $FFE4 to carry on the normal code flow.
